evals.prompt: Create a new location page for 'Academia Ingles Tetuan' at /academia-ingles-tetuan/. Show the complete .astro file.
evals.expected_output: Complete .astro file using BaseLayout with title, description, canonical, schemas props, LocationPage component with client:idle, CookieBanner with client:idle, and generateLocationPageSchema

assertions.text: Imports BaseLayout from layouts/BaseLayout.astro
Uses generateLocationPageSchema for schema generation
Includes CookieBanner with client:idle directive
React components use client:idle (NOT client:load)
Canonical URL has trailing slash (/academia-ingles-tetuan/)
Passes schemas array to BaseLayout props
Passes title and description props to BaseLayout
File structure follows the Astro frontmatter pattern (--- delimiters)
Location schema includes nearbyAreas array with nearby neighborhoods
No banned AI words used (delve, tapestry, realm, leverage, etc.)

evals.prompt: Create a new exam preparation page for Linguaskill Business at /linguaskill/business/. This is a course page, not a location page.
evals.expected_output: Complete .astro file using BaseLayout with course-specific schema (generateCourseSchema), correct component hydration, and proper canonical URL

assertions.text: Uses generateCourseSchema (NOT generateLocationPageSchema) for a course page
Imports BaseLayout from layouts/BaseLayout.astro
Includes CookieBanner with client:idle
Canonical URL ends with trailing slash (/linguaskill/business/)
React components use client:idle hydration
Course schema includes provider reference to Organization
File is placed in src/pages/linguaskill/ directory
Mentions checking if old URLs need redirects in vercel.json
No placeholder text remains (TODO, REPLACE, TBD)
No banned AI words used
